new version of BoomCap Music is now available on the Google Play Store. Update now to get access to the following features/changes:

New Features:

- Improved User Interface Aesthetics.

- Improved support for High Fidelity formats such as FLAC, ALAC, APE and more.

- Improved Music Searching, find more music and videos much easier.

- Added support for Equalizer Ultra Effects.

- Added Mixtapes category to Online Library.

- Added Dynamic Playlists such was Favorites, Recently Played and more.

- Added translations to Spanish and Russian languages.

Changes/Fixes:

- Specific bug fixes to minimize random crashes.

- Miscellaneous bugs fixes discovered in previous version.
